name_en: 🌷【With full original red box packaging】🌷【New】The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, creating a choice for collection in the coming years. This cardholder is crafted with beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. It features ten card slots and one multifunctional open pocket.
name_cn:
🌷【With full original red box packaging】🌷【New】The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, creating a choice for collection in the coming years. This cardholder is crafted with beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. It features ten card slots and one multifunctional open pocket.
Beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern coated fabric
Brown leather trim
1 open pocket, 10 card slots
Weight: approx. 52g
Model: 821208
12cm (W) x 8cm (H)
Color: Brown PVC/Original leather
Italian creation
